title: GMS Week 16 - TIME NEEDED!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 24/04/2023
Image reference: 2023-04-24_gms-week-16-time-needed_img1.jpg
The results of this most recent market decline have been on full display this week as those vessels previously soldat higher prices are now struggling to deliver in a U.S. Dollar starved Bangladesh (and Pakistan) and End Buyers are starting to (expectedly) create unnecessary turbulence at the waterfront, especially on those high-priced incoming units. Steel plate prices continue to dither across all markets (including Turkey) over the past month or so, leaving the various recycling destinations far more precariously poised than they were during the bullish start of the year.
